name: Salesforce
desc: Enterprise CRM for sales, service and marketing.
self_serve_detail: Free Developer Edition org signup gives full API access instantly.
api_surface: Very broad: REST, SOAP, Bulk, Streaming, GraphQL (pilot).

name: HubSpot
self_serve_detail: Free HubSpot account, create a private app token in minutes.
api_surface: Broad REST API across CRM, marketing, CMS objects.

name: Pipedrive
auth: API token, OAuth2 for marketplace apps
self_serve_detail: Free 14-day trial account exposes personal API token immediately.
api_surface: Full REST API v1/v2, documented and stable.

name: Attio
auth: API key, OAuth2 for public apps
self_serve_detail: Free workspace, API key generated instantly in settings.
api_surface: Broad REST API, built API-first; good docs.

name: Twenty
self_serve_detail: Free cloud workspace or self-host; API key from settings instantly.
api_surface: REST + GraphQL, auto-generated from schema, plus Metadata API.

name: Podio
auth: OAuth2 (4 grant types incl. app auth)
self_serve_detail: Register a client_id/secret and pull an API key immediately; raising rate limits or programmatic app-token access needs a support request.
api_surface: Full REST API, mature but showing its age (docs partly 2012-era).

name: Zoho CRM
desc: CRM module of the Zoho suite.
self_serve_detail: Free Zoho account + self-client OAuth app; instant.
api_surface: Broad REST API (Bulk, COQL query language, Notifications).

name: Close
self_serve_detail: 14-day free trial exposes API key in settings.
api_surface: Full REST API, well documented.

name: Copper
self_serve_detail: Free trial account, API key from settings.
api_surface: REST API, moderate breadth (contacts/leads/opportunities).

name: DealCloud
desc: CRM/deal management for PE, M&A and capital markets (Intapp).
self_serve_detail: Client id/secret only issuable to an existing paid DealCloud customer by a Platform-Manager admin; no public trial or self-serve signup.
api_surface: Broad REST API + official Python/C# SDKs, but only reachable behind the paid deployment.
blocker: Needs an existing paid DealCloud tenant + admin-provisioned credentials.

name: Zendesk
self_serve_detail: Free trial account, API token generated instantly in admin settings.
api_surface: Very broad REST API (Support, Talk, Chat, Guide).

name: Intercom
self_serve_detail: Free dev workspace, access token from Developer Hub instantly.
api_surface: Broad REST API, versioned, good docs.

name: Freshdesk
self_serve_detail: Free trial, API key visible on profile page.
api_surface: Full REST API.

name: Front
self_serve_detail: Trial account, API tokens generated in settings.
api_surface: Broad REST API + webhooks.

name: Pylon
desc: B2B support/helpdesk over Slack, Teams, Discord.
self_serve_detail: Paid product (no public free tier docs found) but API key is self-issued from account settings once signed up.
api_surface: REST API covering Issues, Contacts, Accounts, Knowledge Base, Custom Objects.

name: LiveAgent
self_serve_detail: Free trial, API key from admin settings.
api_surface: REST API, moderate breadth.

name: Plain
desc: B2B customer support tool built API-first.
self_serve_detail: Free tier available; API key generated instantly, GraphQL playground included.
api_surface: GraphQL API (not REST) - deliberately API-first product.

name: Help Scout
desc: Shared inbox / helpdesk for small teams.
self_serve_detail: Free trial, register an OAuth app instantly from My Apps.
api_surface: Full REST API (Mailbox, Docs, Beacon).

name: Gorgias
self_serve_detail: Free trial, Basic-auth API key from account settings.
api_surface: REST API, good breadth for tickets/customers/macros.

name: Gladly
self_serve_detail: No public self-signup; enterprise sales-led onboarding, API credentials issued by Gladly during implementation.
api_surface: REST API documented, but behind the paywall/contract.
blocker: Requires a paid Gladly contract; no free/dev account.

name: Slack
self_serve_detail: Free workspace, create a Slack app and install it to your own workspace instantly.
api_surface: Very broad Web API + Events API + Socket Mode.

name: Twilio
auth: API key + Account SID, OAuth2 for some products
self_serve_detail: Free trial account with trial credit, API keys instant.
api_surface: Very broad REST API across many sub-products.

name: Zoho Cliq
self_serve_detail: Free Zoho account, self-client OAuth app.
api_surface: REST API + Bot/Extension SDK, moderate breadth.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
self_serve_detail: Free developer account, create a self-built app for instant tenant token.
api_surface: Very broad Open Platform API (messaging, docs, calendar, approval).

name: Pumble
auth: Unclear / no public developer API found
self_serve_detail: No public REST API or developer docs surfaced; product markets webhooks/integrations, not a documented API.
api_surface: No documented public API found at research time.
blocker: No discoverable public API/dev docs - would need direct vendor outreach to confirm.

name: Discord
self_serve_detail: Free account, create a bot application in the Developer Portal instantly.
api_surface: Very broad REST + Gateway (WebSocket) API.

name: Telegram
auth: Bot token (via BotFather), MTProto for client API
self_serve_detail: Create a bot with @BotFather in under a minute, fully free.
api_surface: Full Bot API (HTTP) + full client TDLib/MTProto API.

name: WhatsApp Business
self_serve_detail: Can start on the free tier via Meta developer app + test number, but production sending needs Meta Business verification and phone number registration review.
api_surface: Cloud API (REST) is broad; Business Management API for onboarding.
blocker: Business verification + WABA approval required for production use.

name: Aircall
desc: Cloud call-center / VoIP for sales & support teams.
auth: Basic auth (API id/token), OAuth2 for public apps
self_serve_detail: Trial account, API id/token pair from dashboard integrations settings.
api_surface: REST API covering calls, numbers, users, contacts, webhooks.

name: Vonage
auth: API key + secret, JWT for Voice/Video
self_serve_detail: Free account with trial credit, API key/secret instant.
api_surface: Very broad REST/JWT APIs across SMS, Voice, Video, Verify.

name: Google Ads
self_serve_detail: OAuth client is self-serve, but a developer token requires Google approval (basic access is fast; standard access for production is a manual review).
api_surface: Very broad gRPC/REST API (Google Ads API).
blocker: Developer token approval step (can take days).

name: Meta Ads
self_serve_detail: Free developer app for testing, but production ad-account access needs Meta App Review for ads_management permission.
api_surface: Broad Marketing API (Graph API based).
blocker: App Review required for the ads_management scope.

name: LinkedIn Ads
self_serve_detail: Free developer app, but Marketing Developer Platform access (ads endpoints) requires an approved partner application.
api_surface: REST API for campaigns/reporting, gated behind program approval.
blocker: Must apply and be approved for the Marketing Developer Platform.

name: GoHighLevel
self_serve_detail: Free developer/marketplace account; create an OAuth app and test on a trial sub-account.
api_surface: Broad REST API v2 covering contacts, funnels, calendars, conversations.

name: Mailchimp
self_serve_detail: Free-forever plan, API key generated instantly in account settings.
api_surface: Broad REST API (Marketing, Transactional via Mandrill).

name: Klaviyo
auth: API key, OAuth2 for public apps
self_serve_detail: Free tier, private API key generated instantly in settings.
api_surface: Broad REST API, well documented.

name: systeme.io
self_serve_detail: Free plan, API key from account settings.
api_surface: Public REST API, narrow but documented (contacts, tags, funnels).

name: Pinterest
self_serve_detail: Free developer account and trial apps get sandbox access instantly; standard (production) access requires app review for certain scopes.
api_surface: Broad REST API v5 (Pins, Boards, Ads).

name: Threads (Meta)
self_serve_detail: Free developer app for testing with your own account; broader publishing at scale needs Meta App Review.
api_surface: Newer, narrower REST API (posting, replies, insights).
blocker: App Review needed beyond self-testing.

name: SendGrid
self_serve_detail: Free tier, API key generated instantly.
api_surface: Broad REST API (Mail Send, Marketing Campaigns, stats).

name: Shopify
auth: OAuth2 (custom apps use admin API access tokens)
self_serve_detail: Free dev store via Partner account, instant custom-app token.
api_surface: Very broad Admin REST + GraphQL APIs, Storefront API.

name: WooCommerce
auth: API key/secret (Basic over HTTPS), OAuth1.0a over plain HTTP
self_serve_detail: Self-hosted; generate keys instantly from any WooCommerce store's settings.
api_surface: Full REST API, self-hosted so no vendor gate at all.

name: BigCommerce
self_serve_detail: Free trial store, API account token instant from settings.
api_surface: Broad REST + GraphQL (Storefront) APIs.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
self_serve_detail: No public free trial; sandbox access is provisioned to licensed customers/SIs, not open signup.
api_surface: Broad Open Commerce API / SCAPI, but behind a licensed instance.
blocker: Needs a licensed SFCC sandbox/instance to test against.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
desc: Ecommerce platform (open-source + Adobe Commerce SaaS tier).
self_serve_detail: Open-source edition is free and self-hosted; integration tokens generated instantly in admin.
api_surface: Broad REST + GraphQL API on the open-source edition.

name: Squarespace
self_serve_detail: Requires an active paid Commerce plan, but the key itself is self-generated in settings, no approval step.
api_surface: Narrow REST API (Commerce/Orders/Inventory only).
blocker: Needs a paid Commerce plan to unlock the API at all.

name: Ecwid
self_serve_detail: Free plan available; token generated instantly via app registration.
api_surface: REST API covering catalog, orders, customers.

name: Gumroad
self_serve_detail: Free account, personal access token generated instantly.
api_surface: REST API, narrow but sufficient (products, sales, subscribers).

name: Amazon Selling Partner
self_serve_detail: Requires an active, approved Amazon Seller/Vendor account plus app registration review; not open to arbitrary developers without a selling account.
api_surface: Very broad but complex (dozens of APIs, per-marketplace).
blocker: Needs a real Seller Central account and SP-API developer approval.

name: fanbasis
self_serve_detail: Sign up, generate key instantly from the dashboard's API Keys page.
api_surface: REST API - checkout sessions, subscriptions, webhooks.

name: DataForSEO
self_serve_detail: Free account with trial credit, credentials shown instantly on signup.
api_surface: Very broad REST API across SERP, keywords, backlinks, on-page.

name: SE Ranking
self_serve_detail: API access is bundled with the paid plan tiers (no free API-only tier); key is self-generated once subscribed.
api_surface: REST API for rank tracking, backlinks, audits.
blocker: Requires a paid subscription to unlock API access.

name: Ahrefs
self_serve_detail: API v3 access is only bundled into paid plans and priced separately by API units; not available on the free tier.
api_surface: Broad REST API (Site Explorer, Keywords Explorer data).
blocker: Paid plan + API credits required.

name: MrScraper
self_serve_detail: Free trial credits, API key issued on signup.
api_surface: REST API for scraping jobs; narrower than Apify/Bright Data.

name: Apify
self_serve_detail: Free tier with monthly credits, token available instantly.
api_surface: Very broad REST API + client SDKs; huge Actor ecosystem.

name: Firecrawl
self_serve_detail: Free tier, key issued instantly on signup.
api_surface: Focused REST API: scrape, crawl, extract, map.

name: Bright Data
self_serve_detail: Free trial, token generated instantly; heavier proxy usage needs payment method on file.
api_surface: Broad REST API + proxy/unlocker products.

name: Sherlock
desc: Open-source CLI tool that hunts usernames across social networks.
self_serve_detail: Not a hosted service - it's a Python script you run locally against public profile pages.
api_surface: No API; it is a CLI tool that scrapes public pages directly.
blocker: Not a callable API - would need to be wrapped as a local tool/skill, and it scrapes ToS-protected sites.

name: Waterfall.io
desc: Contact / company intelligence tool (per prompt hint).
self_serve_detail: Could not confirm a distinct, live 'Waterfall.io' contact-intel product or its docs during this pass - searches surfaced unrelated products sharing the name.
api_surface: Not established.
blocker: Could not independently confirm this product/its API in this research pass - flagged for a human to verify directly.
evidence: Not confirmed - flagged for manual follow-up

name: Clay
desc: Data enrichment / GTM workflow tool aggregating 100+ providers.
self_serve_detail: Paid plans required to reach meaningful usage; API is newer/limited relative to the no-code table product.
api_surface: Narrower REST API relative to the product's no-code surface; most power is inside Clay's own UI/workflows.
blocker: Public API surface is thinner than the in-app workflow builder; best fit may be webhook-triggered enrichment rather than full agent control.

name: GitHub
desc: Code hosting, CI/CD and collaboration platform.
auth: OAuth2, Personal Access Token, GitHub App tokens
self_serve_detail: Free account, PAT generated instantly in settings.
api_surface: Very broad REST + GraphQL API.

name: Vercel
self_serve_detail: Free Hobby plan, token generated instantly.
api_surface: Broad REST API (deployments, domains, env vars, teams).

name: Netlify
self_serve_detail: Free plan, PAT generated instantly in user settings.
api_surface: Broad REST API + OpenAPI spec.

name: Cloudflare
desc: CDN, DNS, security and edge compute platform.
self_serve_detail: Free plan, scoped API token generated instantly.
api_surface: Very broad REST API across dozens of products.

name: Supabase
auth: API key (anon/service role), OAuth2 for Management API
self_serve_detail: Free project, keys instant on project creation.
api_surface: Broad REST (PostgREST-based) + Realtime + Management API.

name: Neo4j
auth: Basic auth / bearer token (driver-based, not classic REST)
self_serve_detail: Free AuraDB instance, credentials instant on creation.
api_surface: Primarily Bolt-protocol drivers + Cypher; Aura also has a management REST API. Not a classic REST/GraphQL resource API.
blocker: Query interface is Cypher-over-Bolt, not simple REST - toolkit needs a Cypher-aware wrapper rather than plain HTTP calls.

name: Snowflake
self_serve_detail: Free trial account with credits, SQL API/key-pair auth self-configured.
api_surface: Broad SQL REST API + Snowpark; can be complex to provision (warehouses/roles).

name: MongoDB Atlas
auth: API key (public/private, HMAC) for Atlas Admin API; connection-string auth for data
self_serve_detail: Free M0 cluster, Atlas API keys generated instantly.
api_surface: Broad Admin API (cluster mgmt) + Data API for documents.

name: Datadog
self_serve_detail: Free trial, both keys generated instantly in settings.
api_surface: Very broad REST API across dozens of monitoring products.

name: Sentry
self_serve_detail: Free Developer plan, token generated instantly.
api_surface: Broad REST API (issues, events, projects, releases).

name: Notion
self_serve_detail: Free account, internal integration token instant.
api_surface: Broad REST API (pages, databases, blocks, users).

name: Airtable
self_serve_detail: Free plan, PAT generated instantly.
api_surface: Broad REST API, per-base metadata + records API.

name: Linear
self_serve_detail: Free plan, personal API key generated instantly.
api_surface: GraphQL API only (no REST), full CRUD on issues/projects.

name: Jira
self_serve_detail: Free tier, API token generated instantly at id.atlassian.com.
api_surface: Very broad REST API (Jira, Jira Service Management, Agile).

name: Asana
self_serve_detail: Free plan, PAT generated instantly.
api_surface: Broad REST API (tasks, projects, portfolios, goals).

name: Monday.com
self_serve_detail: Free plan, personal token generated instantly.
api_surface: GraphQL API only, broad coverage of boards/items/columns.

name: ClickUp
self_serve_detail: Free plan, personal token generated instantly.
api_surface: Broad REST API (tasks, spaces, docs, goals).

name: Coda
self_serve_detail: Free plan, token generated instantly in account settings.
api_surface: REST API for docs/tables/rows/automations; moderate breadth.

name: Smartsheet
self_serve_detail: Free trial, access token generated instantly from Personal Settings.
api_surface: Broad REST API (sheets, reports, workspaces, webhooks).

name: Harvest
self_serve_detail: Free trial, PAT generated instantly in developer settings.
api_surface: Full REST API v2 (time entries, projects, invoices).

name: Stripe
self_serve_detail: Free account, test-mode keys instant; live mode needs basic business verification.
api_surface: Very broad, best-in-class REST API.

name: Plaid
desc: Bank account linking / financial data aggregation.
self_serve_detail: Free Sandbox environment instantly; Production access requires an application review before going live.
api_surface: Broad REST API (Auth, Transactions, Identity, etc).
blocker: Production access requires Plaid's app-review/approval step.

name: Binance
self_serve_detail: Free account (identity verification needed for full trading limits), API key generated instantly.
api_surface: Very broad REST + WebSocket API (spot, futures, margin).

name: Paygent Connect
desc: Payment gateway integration described as NMI-powered.
self_serve_detail: Could not locate a distinct public 'Paygent Connect' developer portal; NMI-based gateways typically provision credentials only after merchant underwriting.
api_surface: Not independently confirmed in this pass.
blocker: No public developer docs found; payment gateways in this category are normally merchant-underwriting-gated regardless.
evidence: Not confirmed - flagged for manual follow-up

name: iPayX
self_serve_detail: Docs URL given in the source list did not resolve to independently verifiable public documentation during this pass.
api_surface: Not independently confirmed.
blocker: Could not verify product/docs in this research pass - needs direct human follow-up.
evidence: Not confirmed - flagged for manual follow-up

name: QuickBooks
self_serve_detail: Free Intuit developer account + Sandbox company instantly; production keys require a completed app listing.
api_surface: Broad REST API (Accounting, Payments, Payroll).

name: Xero
self_serve_detail: Free developer account + demo company instantly.
api_surface: Broad REST API (Accounting, Payroll, Files, Assets).

name: Brex
self_serve_detail: API access is provisioned to existing Brex customers; no open public sandbox/signup for arbitrary developers.
api_surface: Broad REST API (cards, transactions, budgets), but customer-only.
blocker: Requires an active Brex account to get credentials.

name: Ramp
self_serve_detail: API access is provisioned to existing Ramp customers/partners; developer portal requires a business account.
api_surface: Broad REST API (cards, transactions, bills, accounting sync).
blocker: Requires an active Ramp business account.

name: PitchBook
self_serve_detail: No public signup at all; data access (including API) is sold via enterprise subscription and sales contact.
api_surface: Not publicly documented outside of licensed-customer portal.
blocker: Contact-sales-only; no self-serve tier exists.

name: NotebookLM
auth: Enterprise: Google Cloud IAM/OAuth2. Consumer: none (no public API).
self_serve_detail: Consumer NotebookLM has no public API at all; Google now documents an Enterprise API but it's Google Cloud/enterprise-oriented, not open self-serve. A separate consumer Podcast API exists but is deprecated with no new allowlisting.
api_surface: No public consumer REST API; community projects use browser-cookie automation (unofficial, fragile) or MCP wrappers around the UI.
blocker: No official, self-serve public API; only unofficial browser-automation wrappers exist for the consumer product.

name: Otter AI
auth: Unclear for public API; MCP server exists per prompt hint
self_serve_detail: No broadly documented self-serve public REST API for third-party developers; access appears to route through an MCP server / partner integrations rather than an open API key signup.
api_surface: Primarily consumed via an MCP server rather than open REST docs.
blocker: No clear open self-serve API signup found; MCP path needs confirmation of auth model.

name: Fathom
self_serve_detail: Fathom ships an official MCP server; connect and authenticate directly, no manual approval step found.
api_surface: Primary integration surface is the official MCP server rather than a classic public REST reference.

name: Consensus
self_serve_detail: Prompt's own hint flags OAuth as 'requested', i.e., not an instantly-issued key; treat as needing an explicit developer access request.
api_surface: Not broadly documented publicly; likely limited/partner API.
blocker: Access appears to be requested/approved rather than instant self-serve.

name: Reducto
desc: Document parsing / extraction API for LLM pipelines.
self_serve_detail: Free-credit signup, API key issued instantly on account creation.
api_surface: Focused REST API: parse, extract, split documents into LLM-ready output.

name: Devin
self_serve_detail: External API requires an active paid Devin subscription/seat; key is then self-issued.
api_surface: REST 'External API' to spin up Devin sessions programmatically; also has an MCP-style workflow.
blocker: Requires a paid Devin plan.

name: higgsfield
self_serve_detail: Account + API key required; third-party integration docs (e.g. Make.com) confirm plain API-key auth.
api_surface: REST API for video/image generation jobs.

name: Mermaid CLI
desc: Open-source CLI that renders Mermaid diagram syntax to images.
self_serve_detail: Installed via npm, runs entirely locally - no auth, no account, nothing to gate.
api_surface: No hosted API; it's a local rendering tool. Trivially wrappable as an agent 'skill' (shell exec) rather than a toolkit connector.
blocker: Not a connector in the OAuth/API-key sense - buildable as a local execution skill instead.

name: YouTube Transcript
auth: None for the unofficial method; API key for official captions endpoint
self_serve_detail: Two paths: (a) unofficial libraries/services like transcriptapi.com scrape the public timedtext endpoint with no auth; (b) YouTube Data API's captions.download is official but requires OAuth2 and is restricted to the video owner's own captions.
api_surface: Unofficial route is a thin scraping wrapper; official route (YouTube Data API) is narrow and permission-restricted.
blocker: Official route is heavily restricted; most working tools rely on the unofficial, ToS-grey scraping approach.

name: Grain
desc: AI meeting recording / notes and highlight reels.
self_serve_detail: API access is documented but tied to paid Business-tier plans; key self-issued once subscribed.
api_surface: REST API for recordings, highlights, and workspace data; moderate breadth.
blocker: Requires a paid plan tier to unlock API access.
